title:
SB 1599 - This act provides that a party may request and be granted a change of commissioner in a proceeding before the Administrative Hearing Commission.  The application for a change in commissioner does not need to allege or prove any cause for such change. The act details the time lines for the filing of such application for a change in commissioner.
JIM ERTLE
